untranslatable_reason: Signal specifies z-score calculations with entry_threshold_zscore=2.0 and exit_threshold_zscore=1.5, but z-score is not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Approximated using Bollinger Bands (bb_pct_b) as a proxy for mean-reversion magnitude, but this is not a true z-score implementation.
translation_notes: Used bb_pct_b (0-1 scale) as a proxy for z-score deviation from rolling mean. bb_pct_b < 0.2 approximates 2.0 z-score entry threshold (extreme deviation), and bb_pct_b >= 0.5 approximates 1.5 z-score exit threshold (reversion to mean). Used sma_100 as the rolling mean reference aligned with the 100-bar lookback_window parameter. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short entries based on deviation direction.
